evidence_summary: The ticket contains the customer's name and references a duplicate charge, invoice amounts, and a bank statement, indicating personal and payment-related data.
handling_recommendations: Escalate the issue to the specialized billing support team as per business rules.
Verify the disputed charge and request the invoice ID or registered account email before proceeding with any refund.
Do not promise a refund until verification is complete.
Avoid including the customer's personal or payment details in any outbound communication.
Follow data protection and privacy protocols when handling the customer's financial information.
